Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Mathematics Distillation Challenge – Equational Theories 65 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Library of Short Stories 71 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. A Recursive Algorithm to Render Signed Distance Fields 88 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Tree Search Distillation for Language Models Using PPO 55 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. SBCL Fibers – Lightweight Cooperative Threads 80 upvotes, 13 comments
  6. Baochip-1x: What it is, why I'm doing it now and how it came about 305 upvotes, 68 comments
  7. A look inside Dialector, filmmaker Chris Marker's chatbot from 1988 34 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. A most elegant TCP hole punching algorithm 64 upvotes, 11 comments
  9. Why Mathematica does not simplify sinh(arccosh(x)) 38 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Show HN: GrobPaint: Somewhere Between MS Paint and Paint.net 41 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Bumblebee queens breathe underwater to survive drowning 115 upvotes, 26 comments
  12. Rack-mount hydroponics 121 upvotes, 28 comments
  13. The Enterprise Context Layer 50 upvotes, 10 comments
  14. Fedora 44 on the Raspberry Pi 5 92 upvotes, 26 comments
  15. Python: The Optimization Ladder 315 upvotes, 111 comments
  16. Postgres with Builtin File Systems 62 upvotes, 16 comments
  17. Marketing for Founders 165 upvotes, 64 comments
  18. Allow me to get to know you, mistakes and all 121 upvotes, 47 comments
  19. Launching the Claude Partner Network 136 upvotes, 67 comments
  20. Show HN: Han – A Korean programming language written in Rust 164 upvotes, 92 comments
  21. An ode to bzip 125 upvotes, 68 comments
  22. Airbus is preparing two uncrewed combat aircraft 128 upvotes, 70 comments
  23. Ageless Linux – Software for humans of indeterminate age 580 upvotes, 376 comments
  24. Hostile Volume – A game about adjusting volume with intentionally bad UI 91 upvotes, 59 comments
  25. How kernel anti-cheats work 148 upvotes, 113 comments
  26. Jeff Bezos wants Washington Post’s newsroom budget halved, productivity doubled 57 upvotes, 38 comments
  27. An unappetizing shrub became different vegetables 30 upvotes, 17 comments
  28. The Passion of Will Self 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. MCP is dead; long live MCP 121 upvotes, 123 comments
  30. Treasure hunter freed from jail after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold 74 upvotes, 84 comments

Last generated 4:30pm, 15 March 2026. Source here.
